mapper.sql: arrangeClassId, spsId, coachClassId, coachId, studentId, classPlace, classPlaceId, className, classTime, classStatus, createdDate
mapper.insert: insert into arrange_class (arrangeClassId, coachClassId, coachId, studentId, classPlace, classTime, classStatus, createdDate) values (#{arrangeClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{coachClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{studentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{classPlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into arrange_class
arrangeClassId,
spsId,
coachClassId,
coachId,
studentId,
classPlace,
classPlaceId,
classTime,
classDate,
classStatus,
createdDate,
className,
price,
duration,
validityDate,
#{arrangeClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{spsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{coachClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{studentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{classPlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{classPlaceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{classDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{classStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{duration,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update arrange_class
coachClassId = #{coachClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
studentId = #{studentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
classPlace = #{classPlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
classTime = #{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
classStatus = #{classStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where arrangeClassId = #{arrangeClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update arrange_class set coachClassId = #{coachClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, studentId = #{studentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, classPlace = #{classPlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, classTime = #{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, classStatus = #{classStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where arrangeClassId = #{arrangeClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select ac.arrangeClassId, ac.studentId, ac.coachClassId, ac.coachId, co.coachName, co.grade, co.headImgUrl, co.phone, (case when ac.classStatus=0 and TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), ac.classTime)>120 then 1 else 0 end ) as cancelFlag, ac.className, ac.classPlace, ac.classTime, ui.rongCloudId, ui.rongCloudToken, ac.classStatus from arrange_class ac left join coach co on co.coachId = ac.coachId left join user_info ui on ui.userId = co.userId where ac.studentId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by ac.createdDate desc LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from arrange_class ac left join coach co on co.coachId = ac.coachId left join user_info ui on ui.userId = co.userId where ac.studentId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: update arrange_class set classStatus = #{status}, createdDate = now() where arrangeClassId = #{arrangeClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select ac.arrangeClassId, sps.orderNo, sps.orderType, ac.className, ac.coachId, co.userId, co.grade, ac.studentId, ac.price, ac.studentId from arrange_class ac inner join stu_privateclass_ship sps on sps.spsId=ac.spsId inner join coach co on co.coachId = ac.coachId where ac.classStatus = 0 and TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, date_add(str_to_date(ac.classTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), interval ifnull(ac.duration,0) minute), date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'))>1440
